title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su shares five operational guidelines for Claude Cowork after three months of running his business on the platform. Key practices include keeping root documentation lean, structuring memory files effectively, archiving outdated content, migrating Projects into Cowork workstations, and distinguishing between skills and workstations.
